primary_sources.title: Unicode Standard Annex #31: Unicode Identifiers and Syntax

finding: Identifier_Status eligibility and confusable-skeleton uniqueness do not establish lexical validity. UAX #31 R1-1 recommends XID_Start for the first scalar and XID_Continue for all following scalars; these properties must be parsed from the same authenticated DerivedCoreProperties bytes already used by the admission system.
design_implication: Insert a separate fail-closed syntax decision before registration, preserve syntax/profile/confusable claims independently, and admit only when all three are satisfied.

verification.source_syntax: node --check passed for byte-identical pre-commit module and test files
verification.runtime_test: not executed because the automation container could not resolve github.com to obtain the repository dependency graph

uncertainty: Full Unicode 17.0.0 conformance corpus has not been executed.
Joining-control contextual rules and script restriction levels remain outside this gate.
Manifest authenticity still depends on an independently trusted digest channel.
falsification_route: Admit a non-XID_Start scalar in first position.
Admit a non-XID_Continue scalar after first position.
Demonstrate disagreement with a Unicode 17.0.0 UAX #31 R1-1 reference case.
privacy: Public standards, repository code, and abstract test cases only; no private chat, health, credential, or identifying material.
